item.title: just when started loving LA, something really bad happened recently, we started doing late night walks. walks are very important to me and before, I thought LA was dangerous so I avoided it at night. and as for big picture, I finally decided on getting a

item.title: what your messages during this season really mean…✨ part eight special Christmas edition! “circle back in January” = circle back never “will action post-holidays” = I have deleted your email “my out-of-office is on, but i’ll keep an eye on urgent items” =
item.description: what your messages during this season really mean…✨ part eight special Christmas edition! “circle back in January” = circle back never “will action post-holidays” = I have deleted your email “my out-of-office is on, but i’ll keep an eye on urgent items” =

item.title: if you’re not listening to Rhythm is a Dancer as you land in Berlin, looking out the plane window at the grey buildings under dark, low-hanging clouds and dreaming about bratwurst, then WHAT ARE YOU DOING?! because that is true happiness and true happines
item.description: if you’re not listening to Rhythm is a Dancer as you land in Berlin, looking out the plane window at the grey buildings under dark, low-hanging clouds and dreaming about bratwurst, then WHAT ARE YOU DOING?! because that is true happiness and true happines

item.title: New year, same us: just because we are online does not mean we are available, bye ✨ and for those of us helping new starters, make sure to check out Scribe - an app and a browser extension which helps you create clean, beautiful step-by-step guides in sec
item.description: New year, same us: just because we are online does not mean we are available, bye ✨ and for those of us helping new starters, make sure to check out Scribe - an app and a browser extension which helps you create clean, beautiful step-by-step guides in sec

item.title: 2016 can be 2026 but what a disappointing way to think about 2026. how sad for 2026, to only ever have a potential to be as good as 2016 but not top it. we can have a better year than 2016, if we wake up and choose to be happy. life is a blessing, life is
item.description: 2016 can be 2026 but what a disappointing way to think about 2026. how sad for 2026, to only ever have a potential to be as good as 2016 but not top it. we can have a better year than 2016, if we wake up and choose to be happy. life is a blessing, life is

item.title: what your most popular LA phrases really mean…✨ part one: “let’s grab lunch sometime soon! I’ll let you know” - I definitely will not let you know “I am…obseeeessed!” - I don’t hate it “you’re so LA!” - this is absurd/performative/annoying in a very LA w
item.description: what your most popular LA phrases really mean…✨ part one: “let’s grab lunch sometime soon! I’ll let you know” - I definitely will not let you know “I am…obseeeessed!” - I don’t hate it “you’re so LA!” - this is absurd/performative/annoying in a very LA w

item.title: if you have wired earphones, then I think that you’re the most special and mysterious person on Earth. I believe you are collecting little secrets since 2012 and you’re also potentially living a parallel life (in your head). you are here but you’re also

item.title: if your manager is calling you out for starting at 9:05am and not 9am or 8:55am, then they secretly hate you and you need to run from them… unless you’re in a customer service job or somewhere where you need to arrive early because I genuinely do not thin
item.description: if your manager is calling you out for starting at 9:05am and not 9am or 8:55am, then they secretly hate you and you need to run from them… unless you’re in a customer service job or somewhere where you need to arrive early because I genuinely do not thin

item.title: what your favourite abbreviations at work really mean…part two 🥰 “This falls under our BAU” - this falls under our Boring And Useless 😭 “This project needs a clear ROI” - this project needs a clear Reason to Open Instаgrаm 🥰 “I’ll add it to the CRM” - I’l

item.title: to have a friend who is always down for everything is true happiness. a friend who needs no convincing. no deliberation or checking calendars. only the instant yes and the world opens to you both. and achieving true happiness is the greatest goal and the

item.title: a true friend is someone who quietly calls out the best in you - not by demanding it, but simply by existing as that better version themselves with friendships, you must feel pride in your friend’s accomplishments as if they were yours and feel as warmly
item.description: a true friend is someone who quietly calls out the best in you - not by demanding it, but simply by existing as that better version themselves with friendships, you must feel pride in your friend’s accomplishments as if they were yours and feel as warmly

item.title: are you working in tech? or are you working in… marketing 😭 because I think that you are working in marketing 😭😭 doing emails and building decks and changing cell colours in excel that is not tech or coding that is marketing and you have been exposed… if
item.description: are you working in tech? or are you working in… marketing 😭 because I think that you are working in marketing 😭😭 doing emails and building decks and changing cell colours in excel that is not tech or coding that is marketing and you have been exposed… if

item.title: if you’re at @coachella and not attending the @Alaska Airlines experience then I don’t know what you’re doing, summer is coming soon and Europe flights are not gonna get themselves 😭 make sure you stop by for the chance to win prizеs, flights and even Coa
item.description: if you’re at @coachella and not attending the @Alaska Airlines experience then I don’t know what you’re doing, summer is coming soon and Europe flights are not gonna get themselves 😭 make sure you stop by for the chance to win prizеs, flights and even Coa
